sequenceDiagram Note over Content timeline: [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]] is null
[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]] is null Note over Device timeline: [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]].[IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]] is "available" Content timeline ->> Device timeline: mapAsync(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) Note over Content timeline: [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]] is null
[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]] is non-null Note over Device timeline: [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]].[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]] is "unavailable" Device timeline ->> Content timeline: mapAsync(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) response Note over Device timeline: [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]].[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]] is "unavailable" Note over Content timeline: [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]] is non-null
[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]] is null Content timeline ->> Device timeline: unmap(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) Note over Content timeline: [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]] is null
[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]] is null Note over Device timeline: [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]].[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]] is "available"

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，展示工业物联网场景下Content timeline和Device timeline之间的交互。一开始MQTT Broker和ActuatorController都应该是null状态，但EdgeNode在Device侧已经是available。
明白了，所以开头两个Note分别标注两边的初始状态。然后第一条交互是Content timeline向Device timeline发起mapAsync调用，操作对象是EdgeNode，对吗？
对，就是这个流程。mapAsync之后，Content侧的PLC_Logic状态会变化——先是null，然后变成non-null。同时Device侧的TelemetryStream要标记为unavailable。
好的，我已经加上了这些Note和状态标注。接下来应该是Device timeline回传response给Content timeline，同样是mapAsync操作，但针对的是PLC_Logic？
没错，这里有个细节——回传之后Device侧的TelemetryStream仍然保持unavailable，但Content侧的状态要更新：EdgeNode变成non-null，而PLC_Logic要重置回null。
了解了，状态变化有点绕，我理一下：EdgeNode在Content侧从null变成non-null，PLC_Logic则从non-null变回null。然后最后一步是unmap操作？
是的，最后Content timeline调用unmap释放EdgeNode。结束之后两边都要清零：Content侧的TelemetryStream和EdgeNode都变成null，而Device侧的TelemetryStream与EdgeNode的关联恢复为available。
完成！整个流程已经画好了——从初始状态到两次mapAsync交互，再到最后的unmap，所有状态变迁和Note标注都对应上了。你看看还有需要调整的吗？
